description: Letter from Alexandria by a man to his friend, reporting that he had settled the dispute between Shabbat (the recipient's son-in-law) and his wife (the recipient's daughter) with the help of Shabbat's brothers, and recommending a poor and bashful cantor, who was exiled from Spain. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 136, 548; III, pp. 213, 417.) Join: Oded Zinger.
